formats.format: $timestamp=timestamp$ $hostname$ VLAN: $vlan_id$ MAC $mac=macaddr$ learned on port $port$ VLAN $vlan_name$

analysis.semantic_summary: Parser for Extreme Networks switch logs that processes network activity events including port status changes, MAC address learning, and STP state transitions. Focuses on core network infrastructure monitoring and security events.
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: extreme_networks_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (4002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:16:51.702134

-- Pre-compile patterns for better performance
local PATTERNS = {
    timestamp = "^(%d%d%d%d%-%d%d%-%d%dT%d%d:%d%d:%d%d)",
    mac = "([0-9a-fA-F][0-9a-fA-F][-:][0-9a-fA-F][0-9a-fA-F][-:][0-9a-fA-F][0-9a-fA-F][-:][0-9a-fA-F][0-9a-fA-F][-:][0-9a-fA-F][0-9a-fA-F][-:][0-9a-fA-F][0-9a-fA-F])"
}

-- Cached functions for performance
local string_match = string.match
local os_time = os.time
local type = type

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output structure with nested tables
    local output = {
        class_uid = 4002,
        class_name = "Network Activity", 
        category_uid = 4,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 400201,
        metadata = {
            product = {
                name = "Extreme Networks Switch",
                vendor_name = "Extreme Networks"
            },
            version = "1.0.0"
        },
        device = {},
        network = {}
    }

    -- Timestamp handling with validation
    if record.timestamp then
        local ts = string_match(record.timestamp, PATTERNS.timestamp)
        if ts then
            output.time = ts
        else
            output.time = os_time() * 1000
        end
    else
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    -- Efficient field mapping with validation
    if record.hostname then
        output.device.hostname = record.hostname
    end

    -- MAC address validation and normalization
    if record.mac then
        local mac = string_match(record.mac, PATTERNS.mac)
        if mac then
            output.device.mac = string.lower(mac)
        end
    end

    -- Network interface mapping
    if record.port then
        output.network.interface = {
            name = record.port,
            type = "ethernet"
        }
    end

    -- Status/State mapping
    if record.status then
        output.status = record.status
    end

    -- VLAN handling
    if record.vlan_id then
        output.network.vlan = {
            id = tonumber(record.vlan_id) or 0,
            name = record.vlan_name
        }
    end

    -- STP specific fields
    if record.stp_event then
        output.network.stp = {
            event = record.stp_event,
            old_state = record.stp_state,
            new_state = record.new_stp_state
        }
    end

    -- Validation of required OCSF fields
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handler wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local status, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if status then
        return result
    else
        return nil, string.format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
end
